dungeon: GENUINE ROTF target-server run (owner Volti present) — a GALACTIC/SPACE zone ('Ruins of the Mad God') with multiple NEW space bosses + a deep CRAFTING/FORGING + ACHIEVEMENT/ENCHANT economy. HIGH-VALUE for Phase D3 (Galactic Zones) and the crafting systems. Chat readable (grayscale-pulled from dark space bg). 4 new galactic bosses with taunts + the Forge/Scrap/Artifacts/Enchant/Achievement systems documented verbatim.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+f_frames: a dark SPACE/VOID galactic zone — black starfield scattered with orange/red space enemies (asteroid/creature mobs), the player flying/shooting through open void (this is the 'Ruins of the Mad God' galactic dungeon). Plus a tan/sand DESERT zone and a FORGE/CRAFTING HUB (a crafting UI screen showing item + item -> item recipes with a stat panel: Shots/Length/Fame-Bonus). One long main segment (0-189s) then 2 quick exits (189s,193s). Open-void arena (no tight room geometry); enemies spread across the starfield.

bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. 'Ruins of the Mad God' is the GALACTIC ZONE itself AND a CORE boss within it (mecha/reactor theme: 'core', 'limiters'). 2 taunts (1st right-edge cut after 'DODGE'). A core-with-limiters boss = a phase/enrage design. Phase-D3 candidate.

bosses.name: Bloodsworn Knight
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (right-edge cut after 'Bloodsworn'). NEW knight boss 'Bloodsworn Knight'. Only the opening clause captured ('You dare challenge the Bloodsworn[Knight/Order?]...'). Blood/knight theme. Needs a cleaner clip for the full line + attack.

minions: orange/red space enemies (asteroid/creature mobs in the void)
drops: Talisman Fragment x1 (achievement reward -> Gift Chest)
mechanics:
DOCUMENTED — a DEEP custom economy (very high value):
(1) FORGING/CRAFTING: '<Ranger> ... Successfully Forged Forged Vari[ant]...' + a Forge UI showing item + item -> item recipes with a stat panel (Shots/Length/Fame-Bonus). Two currencies: SCRAP (an effect '[?]Rancliad effect! (-15 Scrap)' fires repeatedly = a reroll/re-forge costing 15 Scrap each) and ARTIFACTS ('Spent 225 Artifacts.').
(2) ENCHANTING: on-screen tip 'Enchanting your items increases your DPS' -> an item-enchant system.
(3) ACHIEVEMENT/QUEST system: 'Claimed reward for \'Legendary Hunter\'!' / '...\'Scrap Salvager\'!' / '...\'Monster Cleanup\'!' / '...\'Explorer\'s Trail\'!' -> 'Reward sent to Gift Chest: Talisman Fragment x1'. Named achievements grant rewards routed to a GIFT CHEST (Talisman Fragment = an achievement/craft currency).
(4) CRIER NPC hints: '<Crier> If you want to see where items drop, check [...]' + '<Crier> That generator seems to be making a lot o[f noise]...' -> a GENERATOR mechanic in the space zone (a hint/objective system).
(5) SPACESHIP/ENGINE: 'The engine runs smoothly with [...]' -> the spaceship engine (Galactic-Zones fuel/engine system, cf. the 'Winter Spaceship' vehicle in disc_KF5X3ylt3C0).
GENUINE target-server (owner Volti).
